title: Configure Cloudflare production environment variables
description: Cloudflare Pages production environment variables are configured/synced by the user. Confirmed Wrangler can access the senshac Pages project and list deployments with CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID active. Active env set includes Tina, Turnstile, Resend, contact email, branch, and NODE_OPTIONS values from private env.

title: Test contact form in production
description: Production contact form tested on preview.senshac.com. Contact page returns 200 and renders hx-post /es/api/contact plus Turnstile widget. Same-origin POST with valid required fields returned 200 Spanish success HTML. Required-field validation returns 400. Cross-site POST returns 403. Cloudflare Pages secret list confirms RESEND_API_KEY and TURNSTILE_SECRET_KEY are present as encrypted production secrets. Note: automated success submission used qa@example.com and likely sent one production email.

title: Run final QA across all pages
description: Final production QA across pages using browser-cli/manual browser automation plus curl checks. Scope: multilingual homepage, about, services, projects index/detail, contact, legal/privacy, admin redirect, robots/sitemap/llms, responsive/mobile, console errors, and core SEO/static assets.
closeReason: Production QA passed after deploying Tina admin Rocket Loader opt-out and Hyperscript side-effect import fix. Route matrix returned 200s, contact negative tests returned 400/403, admin fallback no longer appears, and browser-cli smoke showed no public-page browserInit runtime error.

title: Add founder photo placeholder
description: Pending content task from migrated memory: add or replace the founder photo placeholder.

title: Evaluate remaining WordPress migration assets
description: Content migration memory still lists fonts/images/custom cursor and LocalBusiness JSON-LD follow-ups. Review what is stale versus still needed before closing the migration archive.

title: Add TinaCMS visual editing for Astro pages
description: Implement TinaCMS visual/contextual editing for preview.senshac.com using the Astro-specific @tinacms/astro flow. Start with one narrow page, then extend the pattern to core pages and project pages. Scope includes Tina integration, requestWithMetadata data loading, TinaIsland renderers, tinaField markers, tina-island endpoint, and preview verification.

title: Resolve Resend receiving MX conflict
description: Resend receiving DNS fixed on inbound.senshac.com. User confirmed Ireland/eu-west-1. After Resend/Cloudflare automatic changes briefly changed inbound MX to feedback-smtp.eu-west-1.amazonses.com, corrected it back to inbound-smtp.eu-west-1.amazonaws.com priority 10 TTL 3600. Root senshac.com Google Workspace MX and preview.senshac.com Pages CNAME left unchanged.
closeReason: Resend receiving MX added on inbound.senshac.com using confirmed Ireland/eu-west-1 target; root Google Workspace MX left unchanged.

title: Organize TinaCMS admin collections
description: Reduce the TinaCMS admin sidebar from duplicated per-locale collections into a smaller content-type-oriented collection model: Site, Pages, Portfolio, Legal, and System.

title: Define target TinaCMS sidebar collection map
description: Document the desired Tina admin collection structure and exact collection names/labels before editing tina/config.ts. Include Site Configuration, Home, About, Services, Contact, Projects, Legal Pages, and Translations. Parent epic: senshac-c242.

title: Consolidate Tina page collections by content type
description: Replace per-locale Home/About/Services/Contact Tina collections with one collection per page type using match.include patterns over {es,ca,en}. Preserve allowedActions and visual editing routers. Parent epic: senshac-c242.

title: Consolidate Tina project collections across locales
description: Replace projects_es/projects_ca/projects_en with one Projects collection spanning src/content/projects/{es,ca,en}. Keep project creation behavior, filename handling, and locale-aware visual editing router. Parent epic: senshac-c242.

title: Consolidate Tina legal collections across locales
description: Replace legal_es/legal_ca/legal_en with one Legal Pages collection spanning src/content/legal/{es,ca,en}. Preserve MDX format and locale-aware router. Parent epic: senshac-c242.

title: Consolidate Tina translation collections
description: Replace translations_es/translations_ca/translations_en with one Translations collection, while keeping create/delete disabled and making locale files easy to identify in the admin. Parent epic: senshac-c242.

title: Regenerate Tina types after collection consolidation
description: Run the Tina build/generation step after collection names change, review generated GraphQL names, and keep generated files aligned. Parent epic: senshac-c242.

title: Update Tina data loaders for consolidated collections
description: Replace per-locale getHomeEs/getHomeCa/etc. loader duplication with loaders matching the consolidated Tina collections and locale-aware relative paths. Parent epic: senshac-c242.

title: Update Tina island registry after collection consolidation
description: Replace per-locale island registry entries with consolidated collection island entries where possible, preserving TinaIsland fetch/propsFromData behavior. Parent epic: senshac-c242.

title: Update Astro routes for consolidated Tina collections
description: Update home, about, services, and project detail routes to call the consolidated loaders/islands while preserving all locale visual editing routes. Parent epic: senshac-c242.

title: Verify Tina admin sidebar organization
description: Use browser-cli against /admin to confirm the Tina sidebar shows the reduced collection list and that collection links open visual editing routes where expected. Parent epic: senshac-c242.

title: Verify consolidated Tina rollout on preview
description: Run astro check, build, deploy to Cloudflare Pages, Betterleaks, and smoke-test all localized home/about/services/project routes for Tina bridge and field markers. Parent epic: senshac-c242.

title: Add fx Flox command suite
description: Create an extensible fx helper for Flox-backed project workflows while keeping dx as the primitive direnv exec wrapper. Start with subcommands for run/check/build/deploy/ready/smoke and document the command surface in README/AGENTS.

title: Fix TinaCloud schema mismatch after consolidated collections
description: Tina admin on preview.senshac.com reports GraphQL Schema Mismatch and GetCollection failed: Expected to find collection named home. Local generated schema has home/about/services/projects collections, so TinaCloud indexed schema for main is stale or failed to update after consolidated collection rollout.
closeReason: Updated tina/tina-lock.json to the consolidated Tina collection schema so TinaCloud can index collection home.

title: Fix Tina visual editing on singleton pages
description: Fix Tina visual editing on singleton pages. Current reproducible symptom after clean CMS restart: rendering /es/ logs GraphQL Source error "Body must be a string. Received: undefined" from the Tina island/query path while the page remains 200. Verify home, studio, methods, contact, and legal singleton query identity, wrapper metadata, click-to-edit, live updates, and saves.

title: Implement PDF-driven Home, Method, and Studio redesign
Update editorial slugs and restore homepage hero
Implement R2 media pipeline and close reference UI gaps
Enable R2 and deploy Senshac media infrastructure
description: Cloudflare account 41d4ea19fb0990f630257332c927aedb returns code 10042 until R2 is enabled. After enablement: run infra/r2/provision.sh, bind MEDIA_RAW to Pages, configure media.senshac.com and env secrets, deploy workers/media-dispatch, and add GitHub Actions secrets.

title: Match local home composition and typography to live WordPress reference
Provision and verify Senshac Cloudflare R2 media storage
Fix CMS runtime regressions after R2 media migration
description: Reproduce and fix local CMS page failures introduced by R2 migration: editorial Showcase receives null items from Tina and crashes on items.length; branding media IDs are requested as relative /es/brand/... URLs. Verify /es/, admin, Tina API, and R2 asset requests.

title: Clarify updated WEB.pdf redesign requirements with owner
description: Owner decisions recorded: WEB.pdf page 1 Home collapsed, page 2 Home expanded, page 3 Methods collapsed, page 4 Methods expanded, page 5 Works. Home/Methods use independent inline + and - controls with ease-in-out animation, start collapsed, and persist no state. Site target is cookie-free and GDPR/ePrivacy compliant. Novedades syncs exact #novedades posts from Senshac Professional Instagram daily, keeps all matches newest first, removes after tag/source removal, defaults to media-only viewport-fit strip, loops muted videos and 5-second albums, and displays no captions. Encuéntranos en: is static text followed by the first-party Houzz logo. The exact Senshac Houzz profile URL is deferred to owner follow-up in senshac-0198 and does not block implementation; the logo remains non-linked meanwhile.

title: Implement tagged Novedades content model
description: Define first-party Novedades records and display configuration. Include media ID/permalink, caption as non-display sync metadata, tags, media type, ordered children, R2 media IDs, timestamps, visibility, accessible label, and removal reason/state. Exact #novedades eligibility; remove after tag removal or source post deletion/archive/private/inaccessibility only after a complete successful sync. Preserve records on sync failure. Viewport-fit media-only default; full carousel override; looping video and 5-second album settings.

title: Build Novedades carousel from filtered posts
description: Render media-only Novedades items newest first with separators. Default viewport-fit strip; optional full carousel. Videos autoplay muted, play inline, loop continuously from first-party media, and pause offscreen/hidden. Multi-image posts advance every 5 seconds, loop continuously, and use ease-in-out transitions. Disable autoplay/auto-advance for prefers-reduced-motion and expose appropriate pause/control semantics. No visible captions, Meta embeds, SDK, cookies, or browser requests.

title: Deliver revised Senshac website redesign
description: Coordinate implementation of the revised WEB.pdf reference across homepage, methods, works, Novedades, media, Tina editing, responsive QA, automation, and production release.

title: Audit revised WEB.pdf against WordPress and local site
description: Create a page-by-page discrepancy inventory for updated WEB.pdf, senshac.com, and localhost at agreed desktop/mobile viewports. Record layout, typography, copy, media, navigation, and interaction gaps; PDF remains reference only.

title: Implement revised homepage structure and copy
description: Implement revised homepage value proposition, objectives, audience rows, calls to action, Novedades placement, and project CTA following docs/redesign-visual-audit.md. Home matches WEB.pdf page 1 when all disclosures are collapsed and page 2 when expanded. Each expandable section has its own accessible + and - control with independent state and ease-in-out animation. All sections start collapsed and no state is persisted. Prevent mobile horizontal overflow.

title: Match homepage hero typography and offset slogan
description: Match the homepage first viewport to WEB.pdf and docs/redesign-visual-audit.md: assign approved hero media, correct window proportions and font sizes, preserve short line lengths, and implement the three-line even/odd/even slogan offset on desktop and mobile without overflow.

title: Implement detailed methods page content
description: Implement the four method phases, detailed phase deliverables, CTA sections, three service tiers, FAQ treatment, and footer transition following docs/redesign-visual-audit.md. Methods matches WEB.pdf page 3 collapsed and page 4 expanded; every phase and FAQ has its own accessible + and - control with ease-in-out animation, starts collapsed, and persists no state. Include static Encuéntranos en: text and the first-party Houzz logo, left non-linked until senshac-0198 is resolved.

title: Implement revised works index and project cards
description: PDF page 5 structure is implemented with five asymmetric entries, responsive desktop/mobile layout, La Trobada R2 media, and static non-linked Houzz callout. Remaining before close: assign approved R2 media for Doley, Rude, Cinquanta-Nou, and Kylie 360; create their project detail content or disable links until routes exist. See docs/gemini-handoff-2026-06-08.md.

title: Migrate studio works methods routes and redirects
description: Spanish canonical routes verified: /es/studio, /es/works, /es/methods return 200; /es/about, /es/projects, /es/services return 301 to canonical paths. Remaining before close: repeat for ca/en and verify navigation, canonical tags, sitemap, and project-detail URLs.

title: Assign R2 redesign media to approved content slots
description: Mapped Home/Methods assets: redesign/editorial/rocas, redesign/photos/img-9212, redesign/photos/img-9238, redesign/photos/img-9089, redesign/promo-doley, and projects/la-trobada/cover. Remaining: approved Works media for Doley, Rude, Cinquanta-Nou, Kylie 360 and final Novedades assets. See docs/gemini-handoff-2026-06-08.md.

description: Validate desktop and mobile layouts against approved references, including viewport proportions, type scale, line breaks, carousel controls, no overlap, and media framing.

title: Run final local and production smoke suite
description: Run Astro check/build, multilingual route checks, CMS/admin editing checks, R2 image/font/HLS checks, redirects, SEO endpoints, accessibility smoke, and contact flow before production release.

title: Deploy revised site and verify production
description: Deploy the approved build to Cloudflare Pages, verify production pages/assets/admin/redirects, and capture deployment ID and rollback point.

title: Configure R2 event notification and dispatch Worker
description: Configure senshac-media-raw PutObject event notification, deploy the media-dispatch Worker, store GitHub token as Worker secret, and verify repository_dispatch payload delivery.

title: Implement GitHub media processing workflow
description: Implement extension routing for image/video/font inputs, download raw R2 objects, run sharp/ffmpeg processors, upload immutable production outputs, and report failures without exposing credentials.

title: Verify media workflow with rootless Podman act
description: Run the media GitHub Actions workflow locally with rootless Podman act using .secrets.act, representative image/video events, and assertions for processed output and upload behavior.

title: Configure remaining Cloudflare production environment variables
description: Configure production Resend, contact email, Turnstile, analytics, Tina, and media environment variables/bindings; document names without committing secret values.

title: Verify production contact form delivery
description: Submit the production contact form with valid and invalid cases, verify Turnstile and email delivery, and confirm no sensitive values appear in logs or responses.

title: Resolve founder portrait content slot
description: Confirm whether the uploaded Ester portrait is approved for the studio/founder section; assign the R2 media ID or retain an explicit placeholder pending owner approval.

title: Audit cookie-free GDPR and ePrivacy compliance
description: Audit the site for cookies, localStorage/sessionStorage, tracking pixels, analytics, Instagram/YouTube embeds, third-party requests, fonts/media, form data processing, logs, retention, privacy/legal copy, and consent requirements. Target no non-essential client storage or tracking; document lawful basis and required disclosures. Legal review remains owner/counsel responsibility.

title: Configure Meta app and Senshac Instagram authorization
description: Senshac Instagram is confirmed as a Professional account. Create/configure the Meta app, select Business or Creator-specific login path as applicable, authorize only required scopes for reading Senshac own media, store credentials as Cloudflare secrets, document token renewal/revocation, and verify account media access. No Meta SDK or client-side embed.

title: Build scheduled tagged Instagram post sync
description: Implement daily scheduled server-side sync plus manual resync for Senshac own Instagram media. Select exact #novedades and retain all accessible matches newest first. On a complete successful account scan, remove/tombstone records whose tag was removed or whose post is deleted, archived, private, or inaccessible. Never perform destructive reconciliation on API, auth, pagination, or rate-limit failure; preserve last-known-good feed. Normalize IMAGE, VIDEO/REELS, and CAROUSEL_ALBUM children and produce first-party R2 assets where permitted.

title: Monitor Instagram sync and token health
description: Monitor daily Instagram sync and manual resync: last success, complete-scan status, imported/updated/removed/skipped/error counts, token expiry, auth/rate-limit/pagination failures, and alert/runbook. Destructive reconciliation is allowed only after a complete successful scan. Site continues serving last valid snapshot on any sync failure.

title: Confirm Senshac Houzz professional profile URL
description: Await owner confirmation of the exact Senshac professional profile URL on houzz.es. Do not substitute the generic Houzz homepage. Development proceeds with static Encuéntranos en: text and the first-party redesign/editorial/houzz logo left non-linked. Verify and add the profile link before final smoke/release.

title: Optimize Senshac locality architecture
description: Align the repository with four locality boundaries: HTMX plus Alpine.js for locality of behavior, Astro plus UnoCSS for locality of presentation, TinaCMS plus GitHub for locality of change, and Cloudflare Pages/Workers/R2 for locality of delivery. Remove hyperscript and unnecessary global runtime work while preserving multilingual routes, Tina visual editing, contact delivery, and R2 media.

title: Verify locality architecture and production behavior
description: Add focused tests and smoke checks for HTMX success/errors, no-JavaScript form submission, Turnstile failure, header keyboard behavior, carousel controls, reduced motion, UnoCSS generated classes, Tina edit islands, static route delivery, and R2 APIs. Run Astro check/build and Cloudflare preview smoke tests; record bundle and Worker-request changes. Acceptance: all checks pass and the implementation is compared explicitly with the locality architecture requirements.

title: Localize Alpine and DOM behavior by component
description: Move behavior out of Base.astro into owning components. Keep global Alpine bootstrap only while the global header requires it; register reusable Alpine.data components, add scroll-listener cleanup, consolidate Carousel.astro and Showcase.astro behavior, and localize cursor/reveal code with idle cancellation and prefers-reduced-motion. Acceptance: no duplicated carousel controller, keyboard/ARIA behavior works, and page-wide DOM scans/animation loops are removed or scoped.

title: Remove hyperscript and unused frontend packages
description: Remove hyperscript.org from package.json and bun.lock, delete its global Base.astro import and src/types/hyperscript.d.ts, remove unused @alpinejs/collapse and deprecated @unocss/preset-uno, update AGENTS.md/README.md/environment banner to describe HTML/CSS -> Alpine -> HTMX. Acceptance: repository search finds no hyperscript references; bun install --frozen-lockfile and bunx astro check pass.

title: Adopt static-first Astro rendering with Tina edit islands
description: Switch ordinary content pages to prerendered output while retaining on-demand rendering for contact, Tina island, and media APIs. Preserve Tina visual editing, eliminate duplicate header/footer Tina fetches, and cache shared data within a request or at the edge outside edit mode. Acceptance: public pages are served as static assets, edit-mode islands refresh correctly, and dynamic endpoints remain functional.

title: Make UnoCSS extraction deterministic for Alpine and Tina
description: Replace computed utility strings such as md:grid-cols- with static maps; keep complete utility literals in Alpine class bindings; include TypeScript fragment sources or move fragments into Astro; generate icon safelists from bounded Tina icon options; remove unused transformerDirectives if no directives remain. Acceptance: all dynamic variants and CMS icons appear in generated CSS without an UnoCSS runtime or custom Alpine extractor.

title: Harden HTMX contact flow with progressive enhancement
description: Load HTMX with the contact form rather than globally; add native form action and method; return full HTML for ordinary requests and fragments for HX-Request; configure validation/server error swapping; scope Turnstile callbacks to the form; fail closed when the production secret is absent. Acceptance: success and 4xx/5xx feedback render under HTMX, submission works without JavaScript, and production cannot bypass Turnstile configuration.

title: Align Cloudflare bindings and R2 media responsibilities
description: Resolve the Astro adapter SESSION KV warning; document or configure the required binding. Use native R2 bindings for Worker-side listing/deletion where appropriate, retain S3-compatible signing only for Tina direct uploads, and align or remove MEDIA_RAW and S3 environment configuration. Acceptance: local/preview deployment has no missing-binding warnings and every media credential/binding has a documented runtime owner.

title: Clean dead and stale Senshac repository artifacts
description: Remove confirmed dead code and completed migration residue, correct dependency manifest drift and security debt, refresh stale documentation/environment descriptions, and repair git-native metadata health. Preserve generated Tina/admin artifacts, intentional compatibility redirects, active media automation, and in-progress redesign content.

title: Remove confirmed dead code and migration residue
description: Delete root scratch.js, unused HouzzCallout.astro and commented imports, empty legacy component/integration directories, and completed one-time migration artifacts after confirming their operational work is finished. Review .scratch/WEB.pdf and dated handoff/audit docs for archive or removal rather than deleting active design evidence blindly. Acceptance: repository search finds no references to removed files, intentional compatibility redirect routes remain, and Astro check passes.

title: Repair Seeds Trellis and Mulch lifecycle health
description: Review and repair historical Seeds bidirectional dependency mismatches; add the missing Trellis templates directory through the CLI, resolve the orphaned senshac-content-model spec, close/archive completed or stale active artifacts correctly, and run ml doctor --fix after preserving superseding records for migrated .agent-memory/Nix/pnpm anchors. Acceptance: sd doctor, tl doctor/audit, and ml doctor complete without unexplained repository-health warnings.

title: Correct dependency manifest drift and security debt
description: Add the directly imported @aws-sdk/s3-request-presigner dependency; remove confirmed unused packages not covered by senshac-cac3; configure Knip entry/generated exclusions; update direct packages needed to clear known Astro, Cloudflare adapter, Wrangler, Vite/esbuild, lodash/js-cookie, undici/ws, and yaml advisories using compatible upgrades first. Acceptance: frozen Bun install succeeds, Knip has no unexplained manifest findings, bun audit has no high-severity issue with an available compatible fix, Astro check/build pass.

title: Verify repository cleanup without deleting runtime entrypoints
description: Review the final diff and prove that generated Tina/admin outputs, dynamic Tina imports, Worker entrypoints, media scripts, and intentional compatibility redirects remain functional while dead artifacts are gone. Run frozen install, Knip with project configuration, Bun audit, Astro check/build, media workflow smoke where applicable, route/admin smoke, and git-native store health checks. Record any retained false positives and ownership rationale.

title: Refresh repository documentation and environment truth
description: Update AGENTS.md, README.md, Flox activation banner, docs/media-pipeline.md, and related references so they match the candidate architecture: no hyperscript, R2Picture/HLS media instead of astro:assets/public images, canonical studio/works/methods routes with intentional permanent redirects, current Tina schema, static-first delivery plan, and root Wrangler ownership. Remove obsolete examples and commands. Acceptance: documented commands exist, paths resolve, stack descriptions agree, and repository search finds no superseded architecture claims outside explicit historical records.

title: Enable Markdown for Agents on senshac.com Cloudflare zone
description: isitagentready.com reports: site does not support Markdown for Agents. Enable Cloudflare's Markdown for Agents on the senshac.com zone so AI crawlers and agents can request any page as clean Markdown via Accept: text/markdown instead of parsing HTML. No application code needed — it is a single Cloudflare dashboard toggle. Steps: 1) Log into Cloudflare dashboard > senshac.com zone > AI > Markdown for Agents > Enable. 2) Verify: curl https://senshac.com/es/ -H 'Accept: text/markdown' returns Content-Type: text/markdown and x-markdown-tokens header. 3) Check YAML frontmatter in the response has title and description (comes from SEO.astro meta tags already in place). 4) Confirm existing /llms.txt and /sitemap.xml routes are excluded from conversion (they are already plain text/XML). Acceptance: isitagentready.com scan reports checks.contentAccessibility.markdownNegotiation.status = pass. Skill: https://isitagentready.com/.well-known/agent-skills/markdown-negotiation/SKILL.md. Docs: https://developers.cloudflare.com/fundamentals/reference/markdown-for-agents/

title: Expose /index.md routes so agents can discover Senshac page content directly
description: Once Markdown for Agents is enabled on the zone, Cloudflare automatically serves /index.md variants of every page URL. Senshac should verify and document this for key routes so agents and LLMs can reliably fetch structured page content without scraping HTML. Key routes to verify after enabling: /es/index.md, /es/studio/index.md, /es/methods/index.md, /es/works/index.md, /es/contact/index.md. Also ensure the existing llms.txt at /llms.txt (already implemented in src/pages/llms.txt.ts) references senshac.com correctly once the production domain is set — it currently uses preview.senshac.com. The llms.txt should list all localized routes so agents can discover the full site structure before fetching individual pages. Acceptance: fetching /es/index.md and /es/works/index.md returns valid Markdown with YAML frontmatter title matching the page title. llms.txt points to senshac.com not preview domain. Ref: https://developers.cloudflare.com/fundamentals/reference/markdown-for-agents/

title: Audit Senshac SEO meta tags to maximise Markdown for Agents YAML frontmatter quality
description: Cloudflare's Markdown for Agents extracts YAML frontmatter from page meta tags (title, description, og:image). The quality of this frontmatter directly affects how AI systems understand each Senshac page. Audit that every route served by Senshac passes rich, meaningful meta to the converter. Checklist per route: title is set to the project/page name (not just 'Senshac'), description is a real sentence about the page content (not empty), og:image resolves to a real R2 media URL via media.senshac.com. SEO.astro already handles these — verify the CMS content (TinaCMS) has non-empty title and description fields for all active pages and projects. Known gap: some works pages may have empty descriptions. Also check that robots.txt does not block the CF Markdown conversion user-agent. Acceptance: spot-check 5 routes via curl -H 'Accept: text/markdown' and confirm each YAML frontmatter block has all three fields populated with meaningful content.

title: Add JSON-LD structured data to Senshac project and studio pages for agent readability
description: Cloudflare's Markdown for Agents preserves JSON-LD structured data blocks from HTML into the converted Markdown output. Senshac's SEO.astro already generates LocalBusiness JSON-LD schema for some routes via the 'schema' prop. Extend and verify this so AI agents reading Markdown versions of Senshac pages get machine-readable structured data alongside the content. Tasks: 1) Verify that the existing LocalBusiness schema in SEO.astro renders correctly on /es/, /es/studio/, /es/contact/ routes (check via curl /es/index.md and confirm json block at end). 2) Add Article schema to individual project/works pages — these pages describe completed interior design projects and benefit most from structured data. 3) Add BreadcrumbList schema to works index and project detail pages so agents understand site hierarchy. 4) Confirm that the JSON-LD block appears at the end of the Markdown output after Markdown for Agents conversion. Acceptance: fetching /es/works/la-trobada/index.md shows valid Markdown body followed by a fenced json block containing Article schema with name, description, and image fields. Ref: https://developers.cloudflare.com/fundamentals/reference/markdown-for-agents/

title: Add RFC 8288 Link response headers to senshac.com for agent discovery
description: isitagentready.com reports: no Link headers found on homepage. RFC 8288 Link response headers let agents discover machine-readable resources (llms.txt, sitemap, api-catalog) directly from HTTP headers without parsing HTML. For Senshac these should point to: llms.txt (rel=describedby), sitemap.xml (rel=sitemap), and the contact API (rel=service-desc or service-doc). Implementation via Cloudflare Transform Rules (no code change) or a Cloudflare Worker wrapping the static Pages response. Example headers to add: Link: </llms.txt>; rel="describedby", Link: </sitemap.xml>; rel="sitemap". Add to homepage (/) and ideally all pages. Cloudflare Transform Rule path: dashboard > Rules > Transform Rules > Modify Response Header > add Link header matching all routes. Validate: POST https://isitagentready.com/api/scan {"url":"https://senshac.com"} and check checks.discoverability.linkHeaders.status = pass. Skill: https://isitagentready.com/.well-known/agent-skills/link-headers/SKILL.md. Docs: https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc8288, https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc9727#section-3

title: Publish DNS-AID SVCB records under _agents.senshac.com for DNS-based agent discovery
description: isitagentready.com reports: DNS for AI Discovery (DNS-AID) well-known entrypoint records not found. DNS-AID lets agents discover service endpoints directly via DNS without hitting any HTTP endpoint first. For Senshac this means publishing SVCB/HTTPS records under the _agents subdomain pointing to our Cloudflare Workers endpoints. Minimum viable: publish _index._agents.senshac.com SVCB record pointing to the site. Extended: publish _a2a._agents.senshac.com if/when an A2A agent endpoint is added. Steps: 1) Add SVCB record in Cloudflare DNS for senshac.com zone: _index._agents.senshac.com. 3600 IN SVCB 1 senshac.com. alpn=h2,h3 port=443. 2) Enable DNSSEC on the senshac.com zone in Cloudflare dashboard (DNS > Settings > DNSSEC) — Cloudflare handles key management automatically. 3) Validate via: POST https://isitagentready.com/api/scan {"url":"https://senshac.com"} check checks.discoverability.dnsAid.status = pass. Note: DNSSEC propagation takes up to 48h after enabling. Skill: https://isitagentready.com/.well-known/agent-skills/dns-aid/SKILL.md. Docs: https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/draft-mozleywilliams-dnsop-dnsaid/, https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc9460

title: Declare Content Signals preferences in senshac.com robots.txt
description: isitagentready.com reports: no Content Signals found in robots.txt. Content Signals (IETF draft contentsignals) let site owners declare explicit AI usage preferences in robots.txt so agents and crawlers know whether content can be used for ai-train, search indexing, and ai-input. The current robots.txt (src/pages/robots.txt.ts) already blocks named AI training bots (GPTBot, CCBot, anthropic-ai, etc.) via Disallow but does not use the standard Content-Signal header. Senshac's content is a portfolio of interior design work — the owner should decide the policy. Suggested policy: ai-train=no (portfolio images should not train models), search=yes (searchability is valuable), ai-input=yes (agents helping users find an interior designer is fine). Implementation: add Content-Signal: ai-train=no, search=yes, ai-input=yes to the User-agent: * block in robots.txt.ts. Optionally use Cloudflare AI Crawl Control dashboard to manage this without code. Acceptance: isitagentready.com scan reports checks.botAccessControl.contentSignals.status = pass. Owner decision needed on policy before implementing. Skill: https://isitagentready.com/.well-known/agent-skills/content-signals/SKILL.md. Docs: https://contentsignals.org/, https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/draft-romm-aipref-contentsignals/

title: Premade container image for AOT media pipeline
description: The process-media GitHub action currently installs Bun and ffmpeg from scratch on every run via apt-get and setup-bun. This causes significant startup delays for act-media locally and GitHub Actions in production. We should create a custom Docker image that comes pre-installed with Ubuntu, FFMPEG, and Bun, and use it as the base container for the GitHub Action to massively speed up the media optimization pipeline.

title: Enable Cloudflare preview builds for Dependabot PRs
description: Currently we bypass the build on Dependabot PRs because it lacks secrets. We should find a way to have valid Cloudflare preview builds for Dependabot to verify things don't break in production.
